# PROFI — Advanced Statistical Knowledge (Auto-Generated)

*Patterns extracted from 2+ years of 4H data. These are REAL statistics, not theory.*


## RSI Extreme → Next 24h Performance

*When RSI hits extreme, what's the probability of reversal?*

**BTC:** | RSI<25 → 71% bounced (avg +1.7%, 63 events) | RSI>75 → 39% dropped (avg +0.7%, 160 events)
**ETH:** | RSI<25 → 63% bounced (avg +0.9%, 122 events) | RSI>75 → 43% dropped (avg +1.1%, 192 events)
**SOL:** | RSI<25 → 59% bounced (avg +1.5%, 80 events) | RSI>75 → 52% dropped (avg -0.0%, 90 events)
**BNB:** | RSI<25 → 62% bounced (avg +0.8%, 72 events) | RSI>75 → 54% dropped (avg +0.1%, 110 events)
**XRP:** | RSI<25 → 71% bounced (avg +3.0%, 66 events) | RSI>75 → 50% dropped (avg +1.7%, 123 events)
**ADA:** | RSI<25 → 75% bounced (avg +4.3%, 59 events) | RSI>75 → 65% dropped (avg -0.4%, 93 events)
**AVAX:** | RSI<25 → 67% bounced (avg +2.5%, 84 events) | RSI>75 → 58% dropped (avg -0.2%, 95 events)
**DOT:** | RSI<25 → 72% bounced (avg +3.4%, 82 events) | RSI>75 → 40% dropped (avg +1.8%, 62 events)
**LINK:** | RSI<25 → 81% bounced (avg +4.1%, 75 events) | RSI>75 → 46% dropped (avg +0.5%, 98 events)
**DOGE:** | RSI<25 → 72% bounced (avg +3.2%, 95 events) | RSI>75 → 48% dropped (avg +1.7%, 154 events)
**UNI:** | RSI<25 → 56% bounced (avg +0.3%, 116 events) | RSI>75 → 64% dropped (avg -0.0%, 97 events)
**AAVE:** | RSI<25 → 65% bounced (avg +1.4%, 94 events) | RSI>75 → 60% dropped (avg +0.2%, 101 events)
**LDO:** | RSI<25 → 64% bounced (avg +3.2%, 100 events) | RSI>75 → 44% dropped (avg +2.1%, 82 events)
**CRV:** | RSI<25 → 67% bounced (avg +3.0%, 70 events) | RSI>75 → 47% dropped (avg +2.6%, 55 events)
**RENDER:** | RSI<25 → 66% bounced (avg +3.7%, 56 events) | RSI>75 → 44% dropped (avg +3.3%, 87 events)


## Bollinger Band Squeeze → Breakout Direction

*When BB width is minimal (squeeze), which way does it break?*

**BTC:** BB squeeze → UP 55% / DOWN 45% (357 events)
**ETH:** BB squeeze → UP 56% / DOWN 44% (405 events)
**SOL:** BB squeeze → UP 54% / DOWN 46% (446 events)
**BNB:** BB squeeze → UP 56% / DOWN 44% (363 events)
**XRP:** BB squeeze → UP 47% / DOWN 53% (391 events)
**ADA:** BB squeeze → UP 51% / DOWN 49% (425 events)
**AVAX:** BB squeeze → UP 54% / DOWN 46% (440 events)
**DOT:** BB squeeze → UP 48% / DOWN 52% (440 events)
**LINK:** BB squeeze → UP 51% / DOWN 49% (446 events)
**DOGE:** BB squeeze → UP 46% / DOWN 54% (422 events)
**UNI:** BB squeeze → UP 47% / DOWN 53% (452 events)
**AAVE:** BB squeeze → UP 45% / DOWN 55% (427 events)
**LDO:** BB squeeze → UP 47% / DOWN 53% (445 events)
**CRV:** BB squeeze → UP 44% / DOWN 56% (456 events)
**RENDER:** BB squeeze → UP 51% / DOWN 49% (347 events)


## Volume Spike (2x+) → Next Candle Direction

*High volume often confirms direction. But does it predict continuation?*

**BTC:** Volume spike UP candle → continues UP 51% | Volume spike DOWN candle → continues DOWN 45%
**ETH:** Volume spike UP candle → continues UP 54% | Volume spike DOWN candle → continues DOWN 47%
**SOL:** Volume spike UP candle → continues UP 52% | Volume spike DOWN candle → continues DOWN 42%
**BNB:** Volume spike UP candle → continues UP 54% | Volume spike DOWN candle → continues DOWN 45%
**XRP:** Volume spike UP candle → continues UP 52% | Volume spike DOWN candle → continues DOWN 41%
**ADA:** Volume spike UP candle → continues UP 56% | Volume spike DOWN candle → continues DOWN 47%
**AVAX:** Volume spike UP candle → continues UP 47% | Volume spike DOWN candle → continues DOWN 41%
**DOT:** Volume spike UP candle → continues UP 52% | Volume spike DOWN candle → continues DOWN 48%
**LINK:** Volume spike UP candle → continues UP 48% | Volume spike DOWN candle → continues DOWN 44%
**DOGE:** Volume spike UP candle → continues UP 58% | Volume spike DOWN candle → continues DOWN 46%
**UNI:** Volume spike UP candle → continues UP 51% | Volume spike DOWN candle → continues DOWN 55%
**AAVE:** Volume spike UP candle → continues UP 53% | Volume spike DOWN candle → continues DOWN 51%
**LDO:** Volume spike UP candle → continues UP 51% | Volume spike DOWN candle → continues DOWN 50%
**CRV:** Volume spike UP candle → continues UP 52% | Volume spike DOWN candle → continues DOWN 48%
**RENDER:** Volume spike UP candle → continues UP 44% | Volume spike DOWN candle → continues DOWN 43%


## BTC Move → Altcoin Lag Pattern

*When BTC drops/pumps >2% in 4h, how do alts respond?*

**ETH:** | BTC dump → ETH -3.4% (beta 1.2x) | BTC pump → ETH +3.1% (beta 1.1x) | After BTC dump: ETH continues down 46%
**SOL:** | BTC dump → SOL -3.9% (beta 1.4x) | BTC pump → SOL +3.7% (beta 1.2x) | After BTC dump: SOL continues down 43%
**DOGE:** | BTC dump → DOGE -4.4% (beta 1.5x) | BTC pump → DOGE +3.9% (beta 1.3x) | After BTC dump: DOGE continues down 44%
**AVAX:** | BTC dump → AVAX -4.3% (beta 1.5x) | BTC pump → AVAX +3.6% (beta 1.2x) | After BTC dump: AVAX continues down 44%
**LINK:** | BTC dump → LINK -4.1% (beta 1.4x) | BTC pump → LINK +3.6% (beta 1.2x) | After BTC dump: LINK continues down 42%
**ARB:** | BTC dump → ARB -4.2% (beta 1.5x) | BTC pump → ARB +3.4% (beta 1.2x) | After BTC dump: ARB continues down 46%

## Regime Transitions — What Happens

*Based on BTC 30-day returns crossing zero.*

**BULL→BEAR transition:** 90 times, avg next 7d: -2.1%
  Recent: 2026-01-07, 2026-01-19, 2026-01-24, 2026-01-28, 2026-03-07
  *Action: Close longs immediately, wait 2-3 days before shorting (dead cat bounce risk).*

**BEAR→BULL transition:** 90 times, avg next 7d: +3.0%
  Recent: 2026-01-10, 2026-01-20, 2026-01-25, 2026-03-06, 2026-03-10
  *Action: Start with small longs on strongest coins (ETH, SOL), add as confirmation builds.*


## Consecutive Candle Patterns

*After N candles in same direction, what's the probability of reversal?*

**BTC:** | 3 red → reversal 57% (496 events), 3 green → reversal 55% (588 events) | 4 red → reversal 58% (213 events), 4 green → reversal 52% (262 events) | 5 red → reversal 58% (89 events), 5 green → reversal 55% (127 events)
**ETH:** | 3 red → reversal 52% (588 events), 3 green → reversal 52% (612 events) | 4 red → reversal 51% (284 events), 4 green → reversal 50% (291 events) | 5 red → reversal 47% (138 events), 5 green → reversal 50% (145 events)
**SOL:** | 3 red → reversal 51% (580 events), 3 green → reversal 54% (604 events) | 4 red → reversal 50% (286 events), 4 green → reversal 54% (279 events) | 5 red → reversal 51% (142 events), 5 green → reversal 58% (127 events)
**DOGE:** | 3 red → reversal 52% (577 events), 3 green → reversal 49% (619 events) | 4 red → reversal 50% (278 events), 4 green → reversal 49% (314 events) | 5 red → reversal 55% (139 events), 5 green → reversal 49% (160 events)
